summary: Fair recording with noticeable cuts, but the show shines on Deal and Miracle>Bertha performances.
review: The set suffers from audible cuts and vocal flubbing that limit its appeal, yet fans who attended note the strong renditions of Deal and the Miracle → Bertha sequence. While one reviewer deems it unremarkable, another calls it a keeper despite the sound‑system hiccups, resulting in mixed overall sentiment.

ai_rating.rationale: Mixed reviews – strong musical moments (Deal, Miracle>Bertha) offset by noticeable recording cuts and vocal issues; limited data yields a moderate rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Cuts in the audio and vocal flubbing are reported; one reviewer notes occasional sound‑system dropouts affecting clarity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Generally well received by attendees, with favorite versions of Deal and Miracle>Bertha, but overall set considered unremarkable by one listener due to performance lapses.
